---
title: "Air Analyzer"
---

## Wearable Smart Mask for Breathing Activity Monitoring

Air Analyzer is an embedded system designed to monitor breathing-related activity using a microcontroller-based architecture.

The project focuses on sensor acquisition, firmware development, interrupt-based logic, and documentation of the embedded workflow.

![Air Analyzer system overview](images/air_analyzer_overview.png){fig-align="center" width="40%"}
---

## Project Sections

::: {.card}
### Project Overview

General description of the Air Analyzer project, including motivation, objectives, and repository structure.

[Open →](overview.qmd)
:::

::: {.card}
### Hardware

Description of the hardware architecture, sensor connections, microcontroller board, and physical setup.

[Open →](hardware.qmd)
:::

::: {.card}
### Firmware

Explanation of the embedded firmware, main source files, interrupt-based approach, and communication logic.

[Open →](firmware.qmd)
:::

::: {.card}
### Usage

Instructions for cloning, building, flashing, and using the project.

[Open →](usage.qmd)
:::
